notes: Post-repair recheck reconciled all 85 current restaurant-issued menu titles in 15 sections with 85 unique generated items.
Frozen reconciliation: 12 exact matches, 13 variant matches, 8 artifacts or duplicate fragments, and no stale extras.
51 items retain only fixed positive signals directly supported by restaurant-authored names or descriptions; 34 items are accurately unavailable.
The flour-or-corn choices on Tacos al Carbon and Tortilla remain unavailable rather than treating optional wheat as a fixed ingredient.
No negative or cross-contact claim is inferred from the absence of a comprehensive guide.
Restaurant-specific verified snapshot replaces the incomplete generic extraction, preserves official titles, categories, and descriptions, and removes page-structure artifacts.

findings.summary: The 33-row generated record omitted 60 titles from the current 85-item official menu and included eight non-item or duplicate artifacts.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt the full current 85-item menu and removed all eight frozen artifacts or duplicate fragments.

findings.summary: Thirteen generated rows used description text as the item identity instead of the restaurant's displayed item title.
findings.resolution: Reconciled all thirteen fragments to canonical official titles, preserving their descriptions on the correct items.

findings.summary: The official menu provides selected direct ingredient prose but no comprehensive allergen matrix, complete ingredients, negative-claim coverage, or cross-contact policy.
findings.resolution: Retained only fixed direct positive disclosures, marked all other results unavailable, and published no negative or cross-contact claims.

repairs.summary: Rebuilt Atlacatl's current 85-item restaurant-issued menu and conservative positive-disclosure allergen data.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern='Atlacatl rebuilds the current official menu' scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Post-repair menu recheck: 85 current official titles, 51 fixed direct positive disclosures, 34 accurately unavailable allergen results.
